015 */
016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.zeromq;
017
018import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Flowable;
019import io.reactivex.rxjava3.processors.FlowableProcessor;
020import io.reactivex.rxjava3.processors.PublishProcessor;
021import org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.RxBlockchainBinaryService;
022import org.consensusj.rx.zeromq.RxZmqContext;
023import org.reactivestreams.Publisher;
024import org.slf4j.Logger;
025import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
026import org.zeromq.ZMsg;
027
028import java.io.Closeable;
029import java.net.URI;
030import java.util.Collections;
031import java.util.List;
032import java.util.Optional;
033import java.util.Set;
034import java.util.concurrent.ThreadFactory;
035import java.util.stream.Collectors;
036
037/**
038 * Bitcoin Zmq <b>binary</b> service that connects to a single port.
039 * Use {@code RxBitcoinZmqBinaryService} if Bitcoin Core is configured to run ZMQ on multiple ports.
040 * See: <a href="https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/19572">PR 19752</a> for sequence topic information
041 */
042public class RxBitcoinSinglePortZmqService implements RxBlockchainBinaryService, Closeable {
043    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(RxBitcoinSinglePortZmqService.class);
044
045    private final URI tcpAddress;
046    private final Set<BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic> topicSet;
047
048    private final RxZmqContext zmqContext;
049
050    private final FlowableProcessor<byte[]> rawTxProcessor = PublishProcessor.create();
051    private final FlowableProcessor<byte[]> rawBlockProcessor = PublishProcessor.create();
052    private final FlowableProcessor<byte[]> hashTxProcessor = PublishProcessor.create();
053    private final FlowableProcessor<byte[]> hashBlockProcessor = PublishProcessor.create();
054
055    private long hashBlockSeq = -1;
056    private long hashTxSeq = -1;
057    private long rawBlockSeq = -1;
058    private long rawTxSeq = -1;
059
060
061    public RxBitcoinSinglePortZmqService(URI tcpAddress, ThreadFactory threadFactory, BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic... topics) {
062        this(tcpAddress, threadFactory, Set.of(topics));
063    }
064
065    private RxBitcoinSinglePortZmqService(URI tcpAddress, ThreadFactory threadFactory, Set<BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic> topics) {
066        this.tcpAddress = tcpAddress;
067        topicSet = Collections.unmodifiableSet(topics);
068        List<String> stringTopics = topics.stream().map(BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic::toString).collect(Collectors.toList());
069        zmqContext = new RxZmqContext(tcpAddress, stringTopics, threadFactory);
070        for (BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic topic : topics) {
071            // Subscribe to each topic
072            switch (topic) {
073                case hashblock:
074                    getTopicPublisher(topic)
075                            .subscribe(this::onNextHashBlock, hashBlockProcessor::onError, hashBlockProcessor::onComplete);
076                    break;
077                case hashtx:
078                    getTopicPublisher(topic)
079                            .subscribe(this::onNextHashTx, hashTxProcessor::onError, hashTxProcessor::onComplete);
080                    break;
081                case rawblock:
082                    getTopicPublisher(topic)
083                            .subscribe(this::onNextRawBlock, rawBlockProcessor::onError, rawBlockProcessor::onComplete);
084                    break;
085                case rawtx:
086                    getTopicPublisher(topic)
087                            .subscribe(this::onNextRawTx, rawTxProcessor::onError, rawTxProcessor::onComplete);
088                    break;
089                case sequence:
090                    getTopicPublisher(topic)
091                            .subscribe(this::onNextSequence, this::onError, this::onComplete);
092                    break;
093                default:
094                    throw new RuntimeException("Unknown topic");
095            }
096        }
097    }
098
099    @Override
100    public Publisher<byte[]> transactionBinaryPublisher() {
101        return rawTxProcessor;
102    }
103
104    @Override
105    public Publisher<byte[]> transactionHashBinaryPublisher() {
106        return hashTxProcessor;
107    }
108
109    @Override
110    public Publisher<byte[]> blockBinaryPublisher() {
111        return rawBlockProcessor;
112    }
113
114    @Override
115    public Publisher<byte[]> blockHashBinaryPublisher() {
116        return hashBlockProcessor;
117    }
118
119
120    @Override
121    public void close() {
122        zmqContext.close();
123    }
124
125    // Get a Publisher for a topic (Flowable is used internally)
126    private Flowable<ZMsg> getTopicPublisher(BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic topic) {
127        return Flowable.fromPublisher(zmqContext.topicPublisher(topic.toString()));
128    }
129    
130    private Optional<ParsedMessage> parseMessage(ZMsg message) {
131        log.debug("New message received.");
132
133        Optional<ParsedMessage> parsedMessage;
134        if (message.size() >= 2) {
135            BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic topic = BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic.valueOf(new String(message.remove().getData()));
136            log.debug("Received {} message.", topic);
137            byte[] dataBytes = message.remove().getData();
138            if (topic != BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic.sequence)
139            {
140                long seqNumber = fromByteArray(message.remove().getData());
141                log.trace("sequence number {}:{}", topic, seqNumber);
142                parsedMessage = Optional.of(new ParsedMessage(topic, dataBytes, seqNumber));
143            } else {
144                // TODO: Additional sequence parsing?
145                parsedMessage = Optional.of(new ParsedMessage(topic, dataBytes, -1));
146            }
147        } else {
148            log.warn("Ignoring message with less than 3 frames");
149            parsedMessage = Optional.empty();
150        }
151        return parsedMessage;
152    }
153
154    private void onError(Throwable error) {
155        log.error("Seq Error: ", error);
156    }
157
158    private void onComplete() {
159        log.error("Seq Complete");
160    }
161
162    private static class ParsedMessage {
163        final BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic topic;
164        final byte[] dataBytes;
165        final long seqNumber;
166
167        private ParsedMessage(BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic topic, byte[] dataBytes, long seqNumber) {
168            this.topic = topic;
169            this.dataBytes = dataBytes;
170            this.seqNumber = seqNumber;
171        }
172    }
173
174    private void onNextHashBlock(ZMsg message) {
175        Optional<ParsedMessage> opt = parseMessage(message);
176        if (opt.isPresent()) {
177            ParsedMessage parsed = opt.get();
178            processHashBlock(parsed.dataBytes, parsed.seqNumber);
179        }
180    }
181
182    private void onNextHashTx(ZMsg message) {
183        Optional<ParsedMessage> opt = parseMessage(message);
184        if (opt.isPresent()) {
185            ParsedMessage parsed = opt.get();
186            processHashTx(parsed.dataBytes, parsed.seqNumber);
187        }
188    }
189
190    private void onNextRawBlock(ZMsg message) {
191        Optional<ParsedMessage> opt = parseMessage(message);
192        if (opt.isPresent()) {
193            ParsedMessage parsed = opt.get();
194            processRawBlock(parsed.dataBytes, parsed.seqNumber);
195        }
196    }
197
198    private void onNextRawTx(ZMsg message) {
199        Optional<ParsedMessage> opt = parseMessage(message);
200        if (opt.isPresent()) {
201            ParsedMessage parsed = opt.get();
202            processRawTx(parsed.dataBytes, parsed.seqNumber);
203        }
204    }
205
206    private void onNextSequence(ZMsg message) {
207        Optional<ParsedMessage> opt = parseMessage(message);
208        if (opt.isPresent()) {
209            processSequence(message);
210        }
211    }
212
213    private void processHashTx(byte[] dataBytes, long seqNumber) {
214        checkSequenceNumber(BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic.hashtx, hashTxSeq, seqNumber);
215        hashTxSeq = seqNumber;
216        hashTxProcessor.onNext(dataBytes);
217    }
218
219    private void processHashBlock(byte[] dataBytes, long seqNumber) {
220        checkSequenceNumber(BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic.hashblock, hashBlockSeq, seqNumber);
221        hashBlockSeq = seqNumber;
222        hashBlockProcessor.onNext(dataBytes);
223    }
224
225    private void processRawTx(byte[] dataBytes, long seqNumber) {
226        checkSequenceNumber(BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic.rawtx, rawTxSeq, seqNumber);
227        rawTxSeq = seqNumber;
228        rawTxProcessor.onNext(dataBytes);
229    }
230
231    private void processRawBlock(byte[] dataBytes, long seqNumber) {
232        checkSequenceNumber(BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic.rawblock, rawBlockSeq, seqNumber);
233        rawBlockSeq = seqNumber;
234        rawBlockProcessor.onNext(dataBytes);
235    }
236
237    // See: https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/19572
238    private static void processSequence(ZMsg message) {
239        //checkSequenceNumber(Topic.sequence, sequenceSeq, seqNumber);
240        log.warn("Got sequence: {}", message);
241    }
242
243    private static void checkSequenceNumber(BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic topic, long previous, long current) {
244        if ((previous != -1) && (current != previous + 1)) {
245            log.warn("Topic {} missing {} sequence numbers: previous = {}, current = {}", topic, current - (previous + 1), previous, current);
246        }
247    }
248
249    private static long fromByteArray(byte[] bytes) {
250        long result = 0;
251
252        for (int i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) {
253            long ubyte = bytes[i] & 0xff;
254            result += ubyte << (8 * i);
255        }
256        return result;
257    }
258
259}
